description: A multi-domain corpus of policy and regulatory documents for Risk-Aware Policy Clause Importance Ranking. Spans legal contracts, privacy regulations, academic policies, and HR/corporate policies.

notes: Legal: 102 CUAD contracts + ~40 LEDGAR provisions moved from privacy domain
Privacy: 4 original curated docs + 16 new regulation-based docs
LEDGAR files removed from privacy domain — they are legal contract provisions, not privacy policies

legal.description: Commercial legal contracts (CUAD/SEC EDGAR) and legal contract provisions (LEDGAR/LexGLUE)

notes_for_paper.novelty_claim: To the best of our knowledge, no existing dataset covers policy clause risk severity across legal, privacy, academic, and HR domains simultaneously.
notes_for_paper.privacy_domain_note: Privacy domain documents are grounded in genuine international privacy regulations spanning nine jurisdictions (US, EU, UK, Brazil, South Africa, Canada, Illinois) and six regulatory frameworks (HIPAA, COPPA, FERPA, UK GDPR, LGPD, POPIA, PIPEDA, BIPA, EU AI Act).
notes_for_paper.labeling_note: Risk labels (Low / Medium / High / Critical) assigned using rule-assisted automatic labeler followed by manual verification.
notes_for_paper.synthetic_doc_justification: Curated documents follow established regulatory frameworks and were reviewed for realistic clause severity distribution across all four risk levels.
notes_for_paper.domain_balance_note: Legal trimmed from 510 to 102 CUAD contracts. LEDGAR provisions moved from privacy to legal after domain analysis revealed misclassification.
